## Meeting Purpose

[Reconnect Attention.com with GrowthX to explore potential re-engagement for AI-driven content marketing services.](https://fathom.video/share/kMKbkz1f4jSpJUuEtUSsfYRDUzvXMhGx?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Attention.com is considering re-engaging with GrowthX due to increased AEO (AI Engine Optimization) inbound traffic](https://fathom.video/share/kMKbkz1f4jSpJUuEtUSsfYRDUzvXMhGx?tab=summary&timestamp=101.0)
  - [GrowthX has evolved its service offering, now including a platform component and a two-phase partnership approach](https://fathom.video/share/kMKbkz1f4jSpJUuEtUSsfYRDUzvXMhGx?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)
  - [Pricing structure proposed: $20k for 8-week strategy sprint, followed by $12k/month for execution (12-month term)](https://fathom.video/share/kMKbkz1f4jSpJUuEtUSsfYRDUzvXMhGx?tab=summary&timestamp=131.0)
  - [Attention.com prefers a shorter commitment (3-month renewals) and potentially reduced strategy sprint fee](https://fathom.video/share/kMKbkz1f4jSpJUuEtUSsfYRDUzvXMhGx?tab=summary&timestamp=291.0)

## Topics

### Current State of GrowthX

  - [Still primarily service-driven, with platform access coming in \~2 months](https://fathom.video/share/kMKbkz1f4jSpJUuEtUSsfYRDUzvXMhGx?tab=summary&timestamp=158.0)
  - [New two-phase approach: strategy sprint followed by growth execution](https://fathom.video/share/kMKbkz1f4jSpJUuEtUSsfYRDUzvXMhGx?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [Expanded team (80+ employees, $10M+ ARR) with specialized roles (managing editor, director, content manager)](https://fathom.video/share/kMKbkz1f4jSpJUuEtUSsfYRDUzvXMhGx?tab=summary&timestamp=942.0)
  - [Using Scrunch for AEO visibility, similar to Profound](https://fathom.video/share/kMKbkz1f4jSpJUuEtUSsfYRDUzvXMhGx?tab=summary&timestamp=1278.0)

### Attention.com's Needs and Preferences

  - [Strong preference for "buy" over "build" for content marketing](https://fathom.video/share/kMKbkz1f4jSpJUuEtUSsfYRDUzvXMhGx?tab=summary&timestamp=284.0)
  - [Seeking managed service for article production and content refreshes](https://fathom.video/share/kMKbkz1f4jSpJUuEtUSsfYRDUzvXMhGx?tab=summary&timestamp=126.0)
  - [Interest in AEO-focused content structure (e.g., strategic H1/H2 usage, FAQs, metadata)](https://fathom.video/share/kMKbkz1f4jSpJUuEtUSsfYRDUzvXMhGx?tab=summary&timestamp=616.0)
  - [Desire for more creative and prescriptive approach compared to previous engagement](https://fathom.video/share/kMKbkz1f4jSpJUuEtUSsfYRDUzvXMhGx?tab=summary&timestamp=327.0)

### GrowthX's Enhanced Offering

  - [Focus on GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) and SEO hybrid approach](https://fathom.video/share/kMKbkz1f4jSpJUuEtUSsfYRDUzvXMhGx?tab=summary&timestamp=705.0)
  - [Comprehensive AI workflows for content creation, including deep research and fact-checking](https://fathom.video/share/kMKbkz1f4jSpJUuEtUSsfYRDUzvXMhGx?tab=summary&timestamp=1372.0)
  - [Creation of detailed audience personas and company context artifacts](https://fathom.video/share/kMKbkz1f4jSpJUuEtUSsfYRDUzvXMhGx?tab=summary&timestamp=1181.0)
  - [Ability to ingest client documentation and expert knowledge into AI workflows](https://fathom.video/share/kMKbkz1f4jSpJUuEtUSsfYRDUzvXMhGx?tab=summary&timestamp=1399.0)

### Pricing and Engagement Structure

  - [Proposed: $20k for 8-week strategy sprint, $12k/month for execution (12-month term)](https://fathom.video/share/kMKbkz1f4jSpJUuEtUSsfYRDUzvXMhGx?tab=summary&timestamp=131.0)
  - [Attention.com prefers 3-month renewal terms and potentially reduced strategy sprint fee](https://fathom.video/share/kMKbkz1f4jSpJUuEtUSsfYRDUzvXMhGx?tab=summary&timestamp=1544.0)
  - [GrowthX typically requires 12-month commitments due to high demand](https://fathom.video/share/kMKbkz1f4jSpJUuEtUSsfYRDUzvXMhGx?tab=summary&timestamp=1627.0)

### Potential Additional Services

  - [Competitor landing page analysis](https://fathom.video/share/kMKbkz1f4jSpJUuEtUSsfYRDUzvXMhGx?tab=summary&timestamp=1936.0)
  - [Use case pages for Attention.com's product (e.g., Zapier-like workflow builder tool)](https://fathom.video/share/kMKbkz1f4jSpJUuEtUSsfYRDUzvXMhGx?tab=summary&timestamp=1951.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule follow-up meeting with Marcel (GrowthX founder) for Tuesday at 2 PM Eastern](https://fathom.video/share/kMKbkz1f4jSpJUuEtUSsfYRDUzvXMhGx?tab=summary&timestamp=1779.0)
  - [GrowthX to send Statement of Work (SoW) for review before next meeting](https://fathom.video/share/kMKbkz1f4jSpJUuEtUSsfYRDUzvXMhGx?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
  - [Discuss specific team members Attention.com would work with day-to-day](https://fathom.video/share/kMKbkz1f4jSpJUuEtUSsfYRDUzvXMhGx?tab=summary&timestamp=1723.0)
  - [Explore potential for shorter commitment terms or reduced strategy sprint fee](https://fathom.video/share/kMKbkz1f4jSpJUuEtUSsfYRDUzvXMhGx?tab=summary&timestamp=1544.0)
  - [Address Attention.com's interest in additional services (landing pages, use case pages)](https://fathom.video/share/kMKbkz1f4jSpJUuEtUSsfYRDUzvXMhGx?tab=summary&timestamp=1936.0)
